title: Policy: Remove all settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Locked settings in Poly Studio Mobile app become unlocked after removing Lens Cloud policy via "Remove all"
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
4. Verify that certain settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are locked/greyed out due to an active Lens Cloud policy.
5. On the Lens Cloud policy management page, click the "Remove all" button to remove the active policy.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
8. Attempt to change each previously locked setting (e.g., toggle ANC, adjust Equalizer).
expected: All previously locked settings in the Poly Studio Mobile app become unlocked and the user can successfully change them.
